 951→    private fun updateWhiteboardEditorPosition() {
 952→        answerButtonsPosition = this.sharedPrefs()
 953→            .getString("answerButtonPosition", "bottom")
 954→        val layoutParams: RelativeLayout.LayoutParams
 955→        when (answerButtonsPosition) {
 956→            "none", "top" -> {
 957→                layoutParams = colorPalette.layoutParams as RelativeLayout.LayoutParams
 958→                layoutParams.removeRule(RelativeLayout.ABOVE)
 959→                layoutParams.addRule(RelativeLayout.ALIGN_PARENT_BOTTOM)
 960→                colorPalette.layoutParams = layoutParams
 961→            }
 962→
 963→            "bottom" -> {
 964→                layoutParams = colorPalette.layoutParams as RelativeLayout.LayoutParams
 965→                layoutParams.removeRule(RelativeLayout.ALIGN_PARENT_BOTTOM)
 966→                layoutParams.addRule(RelativeLayout.ABOVE, R.id.bottom_area_layout)
 967→                colorPalette.layoutParams = layoutParams
 968→            }
 969→        }
 970→    }

 972→    private fun updateScreenCounts() {
 973→        val queue = queueState ?: return
 974→        super.updateActionBar()
 975→        val actionBar = supportActionBar
 976→        val counts = queue.counts
 977→        if (actionBar != null) {
 978→            if (prefShowETA) {
 979→                launchCatchingTask {
 980→                    eta = withCol { sched.eta(counts, false) }
 981→                    actionBar.subtitle = remainingTime(this@Reviewer, (eta * 60).toLong())
 982→                }
 983→            }
 984→        }

 993→        if (counts.count() != 0) {

 995→                Counts.Queue.NEW -> newCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, newCount!!.length, 0)
 996→                Counts.Queue.LRN -> lrnCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, lrnCount!!.length, 0)
 997→                Counts.Queue.REV -> revCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, revCount!!.length, 0)

1095→    private fun runStateMutationHook() {
1096→        val state = queueState ?: return
1097→        if (state.customSchedulingJs.isEmpty()) {
1098→            statesMutated = true
1099→            return
1100→        }
1101→        val key = customSchedulingKey
1102→        val js = state.customSchedulingJs
1103→        webView?.evaluateJavascript(
1104→            """
1105→        anki.mutateNextCardStates('$key', async (states, customData, ctx) => { $js })
1106→            .catch(err => { console.log(err); window.location.href = "state-mutation-error:"; });
1107→"""
1108→        ) { result ->
1109→            if ("null" == result) {
1110→                // eval failed, usually a syntax error
1111→                // Note, we get "null" (string) and not null
1112→                statesMutated = true
1113→            }
1114→        }
1115→    }

1291→        a.window.decorView.systemUiVisibility = (

1293→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_FULLSCREEN

1295→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_FULLSCREEN
1296→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LOW_PROFILE
1297→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_IMMERSIVE
1298→            )
1299→        // Show / hide the Action bar together with the status bar
1300→        val prefs = a.sharedPrefs()
1301→        val fullscreenMode = fromPreference(prefs)
1302→        a.window.statusBarColor = MaterialColors.getColor(a, R.attr.appBarColor, 0)
1303→        val decorView = a.window.decorView
1304→        decorView.setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener { flags: Int ->
1305→            val toolbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.toolbar)
1306→            val answerButtons = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.answer_options_layout)
1307→            val topbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.top_bar)
1308→            if (toolbar == null || topbar == null || answerButtons == null) {
1309→                return@setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener
1310→            }
1311→            // Note that system bars will only be "visible" if none of the
1312→            // LOW_PROFILE, HIDE_NAVIGATION, or FULLSCREEN flags are set.
1313→            val visible = flags and View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION == 0
1314→            Timber.d("System UI visibility change. Visible: %b", visible)
1315→            if (visible) {
1316→                showViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1317→                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1318→                    showViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1319→                    showViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1320→                }
1321→            } else {
1322→                hideViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1323→                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1324→                    hideViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1325→                    hideViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1326→                }
1327→            }
1328→        }
1329→    }

1353→    override suspend fun handlePostRequest(uri: String, bytes: ByteArray): ByteArray {
1354→        return if (uri.startsWith(ANKI_PREFIX)) {
1355→            when (val methodName = uri.substring(ANKI_PREFIX.length)) {
1356→                "getSchedulingStatesWithContext" -> getSchedulingStatesWithContext()
1357→                "setSchedulingStates" -> setSchedulingStates(bytes)
1358→                else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("unhandled request: $methodName")
1359→            }
1360→        } else if (uri.startsWith(ANKIDROID_JS_PREFIX)) {
1361→            jsApi.handleJsApiRequest(
1362→                uri.substring(ANKIDROID_JS_PREFIX.length),
1363→                bytes,
1364→                returnDefaultValues = false
1365→            )
1366→        } else {
1367→            throw IllegalArgumentException("unhandled request: $uri")
1368→        }
1369→    }

1371→    private fun getSchedulingStatesWithContext(): ByteArray {
1372→        val state = queueState ?: return ByteArray(0)
1373→        return state.schedulingStatesWithContext().toBuilder()
1374→            .mergeStates(
1375→                state.states.toBuilder().mergeCurrent(
1376→                    state.states.current.toBuilder()
1377→                        .setCustomData(state.topCard.toBackendCard().customData).build()
1378→                ).build()
1379→            )
1380→            .build()
1381→            .toByteArray()
1382→    }

1384→    private fun setSchedulingStates(bytes: ByteArray): ByteArray {
1385→        val state = queueState
1386→        if (state == null) {
1387→            statesMutated = true
1388→            return ByteArray(0)
1389→        }
1390→        val req = SetSchedulingStatesRequest.parseFrom(bytes)
1391→        if (req.key == customSchedulingKey) {
1392→            state.states = req.states
1393→        }
1394→        statesMutated = true
1395→        return ByteArray(0)
1396→    }

1398→    private fun createWhiteboard() {
1399→        whiteboard = createInstance(this, true, this)
1400→
1401→        // We use the pen color of the selected deck at the time the whiteboard is enabled.
1402→        // This is how all other whiteboard settings are
1403→        val whiteboardPenColor = MetaDB.getWhiteboardPenColor(this, parentDid).fromPreferences()
1404→        if (whiteboardPenColor != null) {
1405→            whiteboard!!.penColor = whiteboardPenColor
1406→        }
1407→        whiteboard!!.setOnPaintColorChangeListener(object : OnPaintColorChangeListener {
1408→            override fun onPaintColorChange(color: Int?) {
1409→                MetaDB.storeWhiteboardPenColor(this@Reviewer, parentDid, !currentTheme.isNightMode, color)
1410→            }
1411→        })
1412→        whiteboard!!.setOnTouchListener { v: View, event: MotionEvent? ->
1413→            if (event == null) return@setOnTouchListener false
1414→            // If the whiteboard is currently drawing, and triggers the system UI to show, we want to continue drawing.
1415→            if (!whiteboard!!.isCurrentlyDrawing && (
1416→                !showWhiteboard || (
1417→                    prefFullscreenReview &&
1418→                        isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(this@Reviewer)
1419→                    )
1420→                )
1421→            ) {
1422→                // Bypass whiteboard listener when it's hidden or fullscreen immersive mode is temporarily suspended
1423→                v.performClick()
1424→                return@setOnTouchListener gestureDetector!!.onTouchEvent(event)
1425→            }
1426→            whiteboard!!.handleTouchEvent(event)
1427→        }
1428→    }

 44→/**
 45→ * A preference which allows mapping of inputs to actions (example: keys -> commands)
 46→ *
 47→ * This is implemented as a List, the elements allow the user to either add, or
 48→ * remove previously mapped keys
 49→ *
 50→ * Future:
 51→ * * Allow mapping gestures here
 52→ * * Allow maps other than the reviewer
 53→ */
 54→class ControlPreference : ListPreference {
 55→    @Suppress("unused")
 56→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int, defStyleRes: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr, defStyleRes)
 57→
 58→    @Suppress("unused")
 59→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr)
 60→
 61→    @Suppress("unused")
 62→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?) : super(context, attrs)
 63→
 64→    @Suppress("unused")
 65→    constructor(context: Context) : super(context)
 66→
 67→    val screenBuilder: (CardSide) -> Screen
 68→        get() = ViewerCommand.fromPreferenceKey(key).screenBuilder
 69→
 70→    private fun refreshEntries() {
 71→        val entryTitles: MutableList<CharSequence> = ArrayList()
 72→        val entryIndices: MutableList<Int> = ArrayList()
 73→        // negative indices are "add"
 74→        entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_key))
 75→        entryIndices.add(ADD_KEY_INDEX)
 76→        // Add a joystick/motion controller
 77→        entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_axis))
 78→        entryIndices.add(ADD_AXIS_INDEX)
 79→        // Put "Add gesture" option if gestures are enabled
 80→        if (context.sharedPrefs().getBoolean(GestureProcessor.PREF_KEY, false)) {
 81→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_gesture))
 82→            entryIndices.add(ADD_GESTURE_INDEX)
 83→        }
 84→        // 0 and above are "delete" actions for already mapped preferences
 85→        for ((i, binding) in MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value).withIndex()) {
 86→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_remove_binding, binding.toDisplayString(context)))
 87→            entryIndices.add(i)
 88→        }
 89→        entries = entryTitles.toTypedArray()
 90→        entryValues = entryIndices.map { it.toString() }.toTypedArray()
 91→    }
 92→
 93→    override fun onClick() {
 94→        refreshEntries()
 95→        super.onClick()
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    /** The summary that appears on the preference */
 99→    override fun getSummary(): CharSequence = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
100→        .joinToString(", ") { it.toDisplayString(context) }
101→
102→    /** Called when an element is selected in the ListView */
103→    @SuppressLint("CheckResult")
104→    override fun callChangeListener(newValue: Any?): Boolean {
105→        when (val index: Int = (newValue as String).toInt()) {

107→                val actionName = title
108→                AlertDialog.Builder(context).show {
109→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
110→
111→                    val gesturePicker = GestureSelectionDialogUtils.getGesturePicker(context)
112→
113→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) {
114→                        val gesture = gesturePicker.getGesture() ?: return@positiveButton
115→                        val mappableBinding = fromGesture(
116→                            gesture,
117→                            screenBuilder
118→                        )
119→                        if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
120→                            showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_gesture), it)
121→                        } else {
122→                            addBinding(mappableBinding)
123→                            it.dismiss()
124→                        }
125→                    }
126→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { it.dismiss() }
127→                    customView(view = gesturePicker)
128→
129→                    gesturePicker.onGestureChanged { gesture ->
130→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(
131→                            fromGesture(
132→                                gesture,
133→                                screenBuilder
134→                            )
135→                        )
136→                    }
137→                }
138→            }
139→            ADD_KEY_INDEX -> {
140→                val actionName = title

240→                }
241→                return buttons
242→            }
243→        }

286→            override fun upgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
287→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureSwipeUp", Gesture.SWIPE_UP)
288→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureSwipeDown", Gesture.SWIPE_DOWN)
289→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureSwipeLeft", Gesture.SWIPE_LEFT)

291→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureLongclick", Gesture.LONG_TAP)
292→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureDoubleTap", Gesture.DOUBLE_TAP)
293→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapTopLeft", Gesture.TAP_TOP_LEFT)
294→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapTop", Gesture.TAP_TOP)
295→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapTopRight", Gesture.TAP_TOP_RIGHT)
296→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapLeft", Gesture.TAP_LEFT)
297→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapCenter", Gesture.TAP_CENTER)
298→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapRight", Gesture.TAP_RIGHT)
299→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapBottomLeft", Gesture.TAP_BOTTOM_LEFT)
300→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapBottom", Gesture.TAP_BOTTOM)
301→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapBottomRight", Gesture.TAP_BOTTOM_RIGHT)
302→                upgradeVolumeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureVolumeUp", KeyEvent.KEYCODE_VOLUME_UP)
303→                upgradeVolumeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureVolumeDown", KeyEvent.KEYCODE_VOLUME_DOWN)
304→            }

306→            private fun upgradeVolumeGestureToBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey: String, volumeKeyCode: Int) {
307→                upgradeBinding(preferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey, keyCode(volumeKeyCode))
308→            }
309→
310→            private fun upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey: String, gesture: Gesture) {
311→                upgradeBinding(preferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey, Binding.gesture(gesture))
312→            }
313→
314→            @VisibleForTesting
315→            internal fun upgradeBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey: String, binding: Binding) {
316→                Timber.d("Replacing gesture '%s' with binding", oldGesturePreferenceKey)
317→
318→                // This exists as a user may have mapped "volume down" to "UNDO".
319→                // Undo already exists as a key binding, and we don't want to trash this during an upgrade
320→                if (!preferences.contains(oldGesturePreferenceKey)) {
321→                    Timber.v("No preference to upgrade")
322→                    return
323→                }
324→
325→                try {
326→                    replaceBinding(preferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey, binding)
327→                } finally {
328→                    Timber.v("removing pref key: '%s'", oldGesturePreferenceKey)
329→                    // remove the old key
330→                    preferences.edit { remove(oldGesturePreferenceKey) }
331→                }
332→            }
333→
334→            private fun replaceBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey: String, binding: Binding) {
335→                // the preference should be set, but if it's null, then we have nothing to do
336→                val pref = preferences.getString(oldGesturePreferenceKey, "0") ?: return
337→                // If the preference doesn't map (for example: it was removed), then nothing to do
338→                val asInt = pref.toIntOrNull() ?: return
339→                val command = oldCommandValues[asInt] ?: return
340→
341→                Timber.i("Moving preference from '%s' to '%s'", oldGesturePreferenceKey, command.preferenceKey)
342→
343→                // add to the binding_COMMANDNAME preference
344→                val mappableBinding = MappableBinding(binding, command.screenBuilder(CardSide.BOTH))
345→                command.addBindingAtEnd(preferences, mappableBinding)
346→            }
347→        }

 61→    private fun setupButton(preferences: SharedPreferences, @IdRes resourceId: Int, preferenceName: String, showAsActionType: Int) {
 62→        customButtons[resourceId] = preferences.getString(
 63→            preferenceName,
 64→            showAsActionType.toString()
 65→        )!!.toInt()
 66→    }
 67→
 68→    fun setCustomButtons(menu: Menu) {
 69→        for ((itemId, value) in customButtons) {
 70→            if (value != MENU_DISABLED) {
 71→                val item = menu.findItem(itemId)
 72→                item.setShowAsAction(value)
 73→            } else {
 74→                menu.findItem(itemId).isVisible = false
 75→            }
 76→        }
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    fun hideWhiteboardIsDisabled(): Boolean {
 80→        return customButtons[R.id.action_hide_whiteboard] == MENU_DISABLED
 81→    }

 84→        return customButtons[R.id.action_toggle_stylus] == MENU_DISABLED
 85→    }

<!-- Key com.ichi2.ui.BindingPreferences -->
<PreferenceScreen xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:title="@string/pref_cat_controls"
    android:key="@string/pref_controls_screen_key">

    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:disableDependentsState="false"
        android:key="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_summ"

        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="@string/flag_turquoise_command_key"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_turquoise"
            android:icon="@drawable/ic_flag_turquoise"
            />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="@string/flag_purple_command_key"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_purple"
            android:icon="@drawable/ic_flag_purple"

        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference

<PreferenceScreen xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://arbitrary.app.namespace/com.ichi2.anki"
    xmlns:app1="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:title="@string/pref_cat_dev_options"

        android:summary="@string/html_javascript_debugging_summ"
        android:title="@string/html_javascript_debugging"/>
    <Preference
        android:title="Trigger test crash"
        android:summary="Touch here for an immediate test crash"
        android:key="@string/pref_trigger_crash_key"/>
    <Preference
        android:title="Switch Analytics to dev mode"
        android:summary="Touch here to use Analytics dev tag and 100% sample rate"
        android:key="@string/pref_analytics_debug_key"/>
    <Preference
        android:title="Lock Database"
        android:summary="Touch here to lock the database (all threads block in-process, exception if using second process)"
        android:key="@string/pref_lock_database_key"/>

        android:title="@string/show_onboarding"
        android:summary="@string/show_onboarding_desc"
        android:key="@string/pref_show_onboarding_key"
        android:defaultValue="false"/>
    <Preference

        android:key="@string/pref_reset_onboarding_key"/>
    <PreferenceCategory
        android:title="Create fake media"

        <com.ichi2.preferences.IncrementerNumberRangePreferenceCompat

            />
        <Preference
            android:key="@string/pref_fill_collection_key"
            android:title="Create files"
            />

<SwitchPreferenceCompat
                android:defaultValue="false"
                android:key="@string/use_input_tag_key"
                android:disableDependentsState="true"
                android:summary="@string/use_input_tag_summ"
                android:title="@string/use_input_tag" />
            <!-- Workaround for #5533 -->
            <SwitchPreferenceCompat
                android:defaultValue="false"
                android:key="@string/disable_single_field_edit_key"
                android:summary="@string/disable_extended_text_ui_summ"
                android:title="@string/disable_extended_text_ui" />
            <SwitchPreferenceCompat
                android:defaultValue="true"
                android:key="@string/note_editor_newline_replace_key"
                android:summary="@string/note_editor_replace_newlines_summ"
                android:title="@string/note_editor_replace_newlines"
                />
            <!-- #7896 - Workaround for old webviews which could not render some characters in a <code> block
            due to problems with the default monospace font handling -->
            <SwitchPreferenceCompat
                android:defaultValue="false"
                android:key="@string/no_code_formatting_key"
                android:summary="@string/no_code_formatting_summ"
                android:title="@string/no_code_formatting" />
            <!-- #8424 - allow users to decide if they want to focus the EditText
                Note: this functionality is already disabled if useInputTag is enabled
                UseInputTag: has had `disableDependentsState` set, so this is disabled
                if useInputTag is true
             -->
            <SwitchPreferenceCompat
                android:defaultValue="true"
                android:key="@string/type_in_answer_focus_key"
                android:summary="@string/type_in_answer_focus_summ"
                android:dependency="@string/use_input_tag_key"
                android:title="@string/type_in_answer_focus" />
